1	#!/bin/bash
2	#
3	# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
4	#
5	# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
6	# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
7	# You may obtain a copy of the License at
8	#
9	#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
10	#
11	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
12	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
13	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle Lode - capture-assembly spine (guard-free cluster, sourced by
20	# rbld0_Lode): the data-driven Cloud Build composer shared by every Lode capture
21	# kind. Takes a recipe (ordered, pre-resolved step rows) plus an opaque
22	# substitutions blob, composes the Build resource, submits, polls, and decodes a
23	# step's buildStepOutputs slot. Owns NO kind knowledge: the recipe and the
24	# substitutions are data; the only kind-flavored build knob (the poll ceiling) is
25	# passed by the body. Capture-domain constants (the mason capture SA, the TETHER
26	# pool, the regime build timeout) are spine-owned, because every Lode capture
27	# fetches upstream bytes as mason over the network — that is what capture is, not
28	# a per-kind choice. Built on the rbfcb_ build primitives (write-script-body,
29	# wait-build-completion), which it calls rather than absorbs.
30	#
31	# Contract: RBSCJ "Capture Composition Contract".
32	
33	set -euo pipefail
34	
35	######################################################################
36	# Capture-assembly spine (zrbld_spine_*)
37	
38	# Internal: dispatch-time substitution-coverage check. A capture step reads
39	# automapped _RBGL_* substitution registers; a reference to a key the body's
40	# substitutions blob never defines expands to empty inside the build and corrupts
41	# the capture silently — the one composition fault that is neither guarded in-step
42	# (unlike the /workspace handoff, which the steps test -f for themselves) nor cheap
43	# to surface (it costs the whole cook). The _RBGL_* references in a step body ARE
44	# its substitution requires — no separate declaration to drift from the code — so
45	# this scans the include-expanded body for them on non-comment lines and returns 1
46	# at the first reference absent from the blob's keys, logging the offending
47	# register. Sentinel-free return-1 primitive, like the rbfcb_ build primitives the
48	# dispatch loop already rides; the caller buc_die's with the step identity.
49	#
50	# Coverage is flat by design (RBSCJ "Substitution-coverage check"): substitutions
51	# automap into every step, so there is no cross-step ordering; the /workspace
52	# inter-step channel keeps its own in-step guards and is out of scope.
53	#
54	# Args: keys_file expanded_body_file
55	zrbld_spine_validate() {
56	  local -r z_keys_file="${1:?Substitution keys file required}"
57	  local -r z_body_file="${2:?Expanded body file required}"
58	
59	  test -f "${z_keys_file}" || return 1
60	  test -f "${z_body_file}" || return 1
61	
62	  # Keys as newline-bounded text for builtin whole-line membership tests. Empty
63	  # keys (a blob declaring no registers) is legitimate — no test -n.
64	  local -r z_keys=$(<"${z_keys_file}")
65	  local -r z_keys_blob=$'\n'"${z_keys}"$'\n'
66	
67	  # Load the body, then iterate — the file is closed before the scan begins.
68	  local z_lines=()
69	  local z_line=""
70	  while IFS= read -r z_line || test -n "${z_line}"; do
71	    z_lines+=("${z_line}")
72	  done < "${z_body_file}"
73	
74	  local z_i=0
75	  local z_rest=""
76	  local z_ref=""
77	  for z_i in "${!z_lines[@]}"; do
78	    z_line="${z_lines[$z_i]}"
79	
80	    # Full-line comments only — a _RBGL_ token in a leading-# comment is
81	    # documentation, not a read; a trailing inline mention stays conservative.
82	    [[ ! "${z_line}" =~ ^[[:space:]]*# ]] || continue
83	
84	    # Each _RBGL_* token by repeated leftmost match; strip through the match so
85	    # the next token on the line surfaces.
86	    z_rest="${z_line}"
87	    while [[ "${z_rest}" =~ _RBGL_[A-Z0-9_]+ ]]; do
88	      z_ref="${BASH_REMATCH[0]}"
89	      case "${z_keys_blob}" in
90	        *$'\n'"${z_ref}"$'\n'*) ;;
91	        *) buc_log_args "Uncovered substitution register: ${z_ref}"; return 1 ;;
92	      esac
93	      z_rest="${z_rest#*"${z_ref}"}"
94	    done
95	  done
96	
97	  return 0
98	}
99	
100	# Internal: compose, submit, and poll a Lode capture Cloud Build from a recipe
101	# plus an opaque substitutions blob.
102	#
103	# A recipe row is a |-delimited 4-tuple: script_path|builder_image|id|entrypoint
104	#   - script_path:   absolute path to the step script, pre-resolved by the body
105	#                    (the spine owns no steps-directory knowledge)
106	#   - builder_image: the step's builder image ref (colons allowed — hence the
107	#                    | delimiter, since image tags/digests contain colons)
108	#   - id:            the Cloud Build step id
109	#   - entrypoint:    bash | sh | busybox | python3 — selects the composed shebang
110	#                    line (busybox -> /busybox/sh, the only shell in distroless
111	#                    :debug builder images such as gcrane:debug)
112	#
113	# The substitutions file holds a JSON object the spine slots verbatim into the
114	# Build envelope's `substitutions` field; the spine reads no key from it. The
115	# envelope shape (serviceAccount, options.automapSubstitutions, options.logging,
116	# options.pool, timeout) is the spine's; the values that vary by capture domain
117	# (mason SA, TETHER pool, regime timeout) are spine-owned constants.
118	#
119	# Args: token label poll_ceiling subs_file temp_prefix recipe_row...
120	zrbld_spine_dispatch() {
121	  zrbld_sentinel
122	
123	  local -r z_token="${1:?Token required}";                  shift
124	  local -r z_label="${1:?Label required}";                  shift
125	  local -r z_poll_ceiling="${1:?Poll ceiling required}";    shift
126	  local -r z_subs_file="${1:?Substitutions file required}"; shift
127	  local -r z_temp_prefix="${1:?Temp prefix required}";      shift
128	  test "$#" -ge 1 || buc_die "zrbld_spine_dispatch: recipe requires at least one step row"
129	
130	  test -s "${z_subs_file}" || buc_die "Substitutions file missing or empty: ${z_subs_file}"
131	
132	  # Read the substitutions blob's keys once for the dispatch-time coverage check;
133	  # the per-step scan rides the composition loop below, where each step body is
134	  # already include-expanded (zrbld_spine_validate). A JSON object cannot carry
135	  # duplicate keys, so no dedup is needed.
136	  local -r z_keys_file="${z_temp_prefix}subs_keys.txt"
137	  jq -r 'keys[]' "${z_subs_file}" > "${z_keys_file}" \
138	    || buc_die "Failed to read substitution keys from ${z_subs_file}"
139	
140	  buc_step "Composing ${z_label} Cloud Build steps from recipe"
141	  local -r z_steps_file="${z_temp_prefix}steps.json"
142	  echo "[]" > "${z_steps_file}" || buc_die "Failed to initialize ${z_label} steps JSON"
143	
144	  local z_row=""
145	  local z_script_path=""
146	  local z_builder=""
147	  local z_id=""
148	  local z_entrypoint=""
149	  local z_body_file=""
150	  local z_escaped_file=""
151	  local z_steps_built=""
152	  local z_body=""
153	  local z_shebang=""
154	  for z_row in "$@"; do
155	    IFS='|' read -r z_script_path z_builder z_id z_entrypoint <<<"${z_row}"
156	    test -n "${z_script_path}" || buc_die "Recipe row missing script_path: ${z_row}"
157	    test -n "${z_builder}"     || buc_die "Recipe row missing builder_image: ${z_row}"
158	    test -n "${z_id}"          || buc_die "Recipe row missing id: ${z_row}"
159	    test -f "${z_script_path}" || buc_die "Step script not found: ${z_script_path}"
160	
161	    z_body_file="${z_temp_prefix}${z_id}_body.txt"
162	    z_escaped_file="${z_temp_prefix}${z_id}_escaped.txt"
163	    z_steps_built="${z_temp_prefix}${z_id}_steps.json"
164	
165	    zrbfc_write_script_body "${z_script_path}" "${z_body_file}" \
166	      || buc_die "Failed to read step script: ${z_script_path}"
167	    zrbfc_expand_includes "${z_body_file}" "${ZRBFC_RBGJS_SNIPPETS_DIR}" \
168	      || buc_die "Failed to expand snippet includes in step: ${z_script_path}"
169	    z_body=$(<"${z_body_file}")
170	    test -n "${z_body}" || buc_die "Empty step script body: ${z_script_path}"
171	
172	    zrbld_spine_validate "${z_keys_file}" "${z_body_file}" \
173	      || buc_die "Recipe step '${z_id}' references a substitution register absent from the composition blob (see transcript)"
174	
175	    case "${z_entrypoint}" in
176	      bash)    z_shebang="#!/bin/bash" ;;
177	      sh)      z_shebang="#!/bin/sh" ;;
178	      busybox) z_shebang="#!/busybox/sh" ;;
179	      python3) z_shebang="#!/usr/bin/env python3" ;;
180	      *)       buc_die "Unknown entrypoint '${z_entrypoint}' in recipe row: ${z_row}" ;;
181	    esac
182	    printf '%s\n%s' "${z_shebang}" "${z_body}" > "${z_escaped_file}" \
183	      || buc_die "Failed to write escaped step body for ${z_id}"
184	
185	    jq \
186	      --arg name "${z_builder}" \
187	      --arg id "${z_id}" \
188	      --rawfile script "${z_escaped_file}" \
189	      '. + [{name: $name, id: $id, script: $script}]' \
190	      "${z_steps_file}" > "${z_steps_built}" \
191	      || buc_die "Failed to append step ${z_id}"
192	    mv "${z_steps_built}" "${z_steps_file}" \
193	      || buc_die "Failed to update steps JSON for ${z_id}"
194	  done
195	
196	  buc_log_args "Composing ${z_label} Build resource JSON"
197	  local -r z_build_file="${z_temp_prefix}build.json"
198	  local -r z_mason_sa="projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/serviceAccounts/${RBGD_MASON_EMAIL}"
199	
200	  jq -n \
201	    --slurpfile zjq_steps   "${z_steps_file}" \
202	    --slurpfile zjq_subs    "${z_subs_file}" \
203	    --arg       zjq_sa      "${z_mason_sa}" \
204	    --arg       zjq_pool    "${RBDC_POOL_TETHER}" \
205	    --arg       zjq_timeout "${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}" \
206	    '{
207	      steps: $zjq_steps[0],
208	      substitutions: $zjq_subs[0],
209	      serviceAccount: $zjq_sa,
210	      options: {
211	        automapSubstitutions: true,
212	        logging: "CLOUD_LOGGING_ONLY",
213	        pool: { name: $zjq_pool }
214	      },
215	      timeout: $zjq_timeout
216	    }' > "${z_build_file}" \
217	    || buc_die "Failed to compose ${z_label} build JSON"
218	
219	  buc_log_args "${z_label} build JSON: ${z_build_file}"
220	
221	  rbrd_check "${z_token}"
222	
223	  buc_step "Submitting ${z_label} Cloud Build"
224	  rbuh_json "POST" "${ZRBFC_GCB_PROJECT_BUILDS_URL}" "${z_token}" \
225	    "lode_build_create" "${z_build_file}"
226	  rbuh_require_ok "${z_label} build submission" "lode_build_create"
227	
228	  local z_build_id
229	  z_build_id=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "lode_build_create" '.metadata.build.id') \
230	    || buc_die "Failed to capture build ID from builds.create response"
231	  test -n "${z_build_id}" || buc_die "Build ID empty in builds.create response"
232	  echo "${z_build_id}" > "${ZRBFC_BUILD_ID_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to persist build ID"
233	
234	  local -r z_console_url="${ZRBFC_CLOUD_QUERY_BASE};region=${RBGD_GCB_REGION}/${z_build_id}?project=${RBGD_GCB_PROJECT_ID}"
235	  buc_info "${z_label} Cloud Build submitted: ${z_build_id}"
236	  buc_link "Click to " "Open build in Cloud Console" "${z_console_url}"
237	
238	  zrbfc_wait_build_completion "${z_poll_ceiling}" "${z_label}"
239	}
240	
241	# Internal: decode the base64 JSON payload a step wrote to its buildStepOutputs
242	# slot into a destination file. The step index is the only generic parameter;
243	# what the decoded JSON means (its member-envelope shape) is the body's
244	# knowledge, not the spine's. Reads ZRBFC_BUILD_STATUS_FILE (the terminal build
245	# result registered by zrbfc_wait_build_completion).
246	# Args: step_index dest_file
247	zrbld_spine_extract() {
248	  zrbld_sentinel
249	
250	  local -r z_step_index="${1:?Step index required}"
251	  local -r z_dest_file="${2:?Destination file required}"
252	  local -r z_b64_file="${z_dest_file}.b64"
253	
254	  jq -r ".results.buildStepOutputs[${z_step_index}] // empty" "${ZRBFC_BUILD_STATUS_FILE}" \
255	    > "${z_b64_file}" || buc_die "Failed to extract buildStepOutputs[${z_step_index}] from build result"
256	  test -s "${z_b64_file}" || buc_die "No buildStepOutputs[${z_step_index}] in build result — step produced no output"
257	
258	  rbgo_base64_decode_file_to_file "${z_b64_file}" "${z_dest_file}" \
259	    || buc_die "Failed to decode buildStepOutputs[${z_step_index}] base64"
260	  test -s "${z_dest_file}" || buc_die "Empty decoded buildStepOutputs[${z_step_index}]"
261	}
262	
263	# eof
264

#!/bin/bash
#

# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# Recipe Bottle Lode - capture-assembly spine (guard-free cluster, sourced by
# rbld0_Lode): the data-driven Cloud Build composer shared by every Lode capture
# kind. Takes a recipe (ordered, pre-resolved step rows) plus an opaque
# substitutions blob, composes the Build resource, submits, polls, and decodes a
# step's buildStepOutputs slot. Owns NO kind knowledge: the recipe and the
# substitutions are data; the only kind-flavored build knob (the poll ceiling) is
# passed by the body. Capture-domain constants (the mason capture SA, the TETHER
# pool, the regime build timeout) are spine-owned, because every Lode capture
# fetches upstream bytes as mason over the network — that is what capture is, not
# a per-kind choice. Built on the rbfcb_ build primitives (write-script-body,
# wait-build-completion), which it calls rather than absorbs.
#
# Contract: RBSCJ "Capture Composition Contract".

set -euo pipefail

######################################################################
# Capture-assembly spine (zrbld_spine_*)

# Internal: dispatch-time substitution-coverage check. A capture step reads
# automapped _RBGL_* substitution registers; a reference to a key the body's
# substitutions blob never defines expands to empty inside the build and corrupts
# the capture silently — the one composition fault that is neither guarded in-step
# (unlike the /workspace handoff, which the steps test -f for themselves) nor cheap
# to surface (it costs the whole cook). The _RBGL_* references in a step body ARE
# its substitution requires — no separate declaration to drift from the code — so
# this scans the include-expanded body for them on non-comment lines and returns 1
# at the first reference absent from the blob's keys, logging the offending
# register. Sentinel-free return-1 primitive, like the rbfcb_ build primitives the
# dispatch loop already rides; the caller buc_die's with the step identity.
#
# Coverage is flat by design (RBSCJ "Substitution-coverage check"): substitutions
# automap into every step, so there is no cross-step ordering; the /workspace
# inter-step channel keeps its own in-step guards and is out of scope.
#
# Args: keys_file expanded_body_file
zrbld_spine_validate() {
  local -r z_keys_file="${1:?Substitution keys file required}"
  local -r z_body_file="${2:?Expanded body file required}"

  test -f "${z_keys_file}" || return 1
  test -f "${z_body_file}" || return 1

  # Keys as newline-bounded text for builtin whole-line membership tests. Empty
  # keys (a blob declaring no registers) is legitimate — no test -n.
  local -r z_keys=$(<"${z_keys_file}")
  local -r z_keys_blob=$'\n'"${z_keys}"$'\n'

  # Load the body, then iterate — the file is closed before the scan begins.
  local z_lines=()
  local z_line=""
  while IFS= read -r z_line || test -n "${z_line}"; do
    z_lines+=("${z_line}")
  done < "${z_body_file}"

  local z_i=0
  local z_rest=""
  local z_ref=""
  for z_i in "${!z_lines[@]}"; do
    z_line="${z_lines[$z_i]}"

    # Full-line comments only — a _RBGL_ token in a leading-# comment is
    # documentation, not a read; a trailing inline mention stays conservative.
    [[ ! "${z_line}" =~ ^[[:space:]]*# ]] || continue

    # Each _RBGL_* token by repeated leftmost match; strip through the match so
    # the next token on the line surfaces.
    z_rest="${z_line}"
    while [[ "${z_rest}" =~ _RBGL_[A-Z0-9_]+ ]]; do
      z_ref="${BASH_REMATCH[0]}"
      case "${z_keys_blob}" in
        *$'\n'"${z_ref}"$'\n'*) ;;
        *) buc_log_args "Uncovered substitution register: ${z_ref}"; return 1 ;;
      esac
      z_rest="${z_rest#*"${z_ref}"}"
    done
  done

  return 0
}

# Internal: compose, submit, and poll a Lode capture Cloud Build from a recipe
# plus an opaque substitutions blob.
#
# A recipe row is a |-delimited 4-tuple: script_path|builder_image|id|entrypoint
#   - script_path:   absolute path to the step script, pre-resolved by the body
#                    (the spine owns no steps-directory knowledge)
#   - builder_image: the step's builder image ref (colons allowed — hence the
#                    | delimiter, since image tags/digests contain colons)
#   - id:            the Cloud Build step id
#   - entrypoint:    bash | sh | busybox | python3 — selects the composed shebang
#                    line (busybox -> /busybox/sh, the only shell in distroless
#                    :debug builder images such as gcrane:debug)
#
# The substitutions file holds a JSON object the spine slots verbatim into the
# Build envelope's `substitutions` field; the spine reads no key from it. The
# envelope shape (serviceAccount, options.automapSubstitutions, options.logging,
# options.pool, timeout) is the spine's; the values that vary by capture domain
# (mason SA, TETHER pool, regime timeout) are spine-owned constants.
#
# Args: token label poll_ceiling subs_file temp_prefix recipe_row...
zrbld_spine_dispatch() {
  zrbld_sentinel

  local -r z_token="${1:?Token required}";                  shift
  local -r z_label="${1:?Label required}";                  shift
  local -r z_poll_ceiling="${1:?Poll ceiling required}";    shift
  local -r z_subs_file="${1:?Substitutions file required}"; shift
  local -r z_temp_prefix="${1:?Temp prefix required}";      shift
  test "$#" -ge 1 || buc_die "zrbld_spine_dispatch: recipe requires at least one step row"

  test -s "${z_subs_file}" || buc_die "Substitutions file missing or empty: ${z_subs_file}"

  # Read the substitutions blob's keys once for the dispatch-time coverage check;
  # the per-step scan rides the composition loop below, where each step body is
  # already include-expanded (zrbld_spine_validate). A JSON object cannot carry
  # duplicate keys, so no dedup is needed.
  local -r z_keys_file="${z_temp_prefix}subs_keys.txt"
  jq -r 'keys[]' "${z_subs_file}" > "${z_keys_file}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to read substitution keys from ${z_subs_file}"

  buc_step "Composing ${z_label} Cloud Build steps from recipe"
  local -r z_steps_file="${z_temp_prefix}steps.json"
  echo "[]" > "${z_steps_file}" || buc_die "Failed to initialize ${z_label} steps JSON"

  local z_row=""
  local z_script_path=""
  local z_builder=""
  local z_id=""
  local z_entrypoint=""
  local z_body_file=""
  local z_escaped_file=""
  local z_steps_built=""
  local z_body=""
  local z_shebang=""
  for z_row in "$@"; do
    IFS='|' read -r z_script_path z_builder z_id z_entrypoint <<<"${z_row}"
    test -n "${z_script_path}" || buc_die "Recipe row missing script_path: ${z_row}"
    test -n "${z_builder}"     || buc_die "Recipe row missing builder_image: ${z_row}"
    test -n "${z_id}"          || buc_die "Recipe row missing id: ${z_row}"
    test -f "${z_script_path}" || buc_die "Step script not found: ${z_script_path}"

    z_body_file="${z_temp_prefix}${z_id}_body.txt"
    z_escaped_file="${z_temp_prefix}${z_id}_escaped.txt"
    z_steps_built="${z_temp_prefix}${z_id}_steps.json"

    zrbfc_write_script_body "${z_script_path}" "${z_body_file}" \
      || buc_die "Failed to read step script: ${z_script_path}"
    zrbfc_expand_includes "${z_body_file}" "${ZRBFC_RBGJS_SNIPPETS_DIR}" \
      || buc_die "Failed to expand snippet includes in step: ${z_script_path}"
    z_body=$(<"${z_body_file}")
    test -n "${z_body}" || buc_die "Empty step script body: ${z_script_path}"

    zrbld_spine_validate "${z_keys_file}" "${z_body_file}" \
      || buc_die "Recipe step '${z_id}' references a substitution register absent from the composition blob (see transcript)"

    case "${z_entrypoint}" in
      bash)    z_shebang="#!/bin/bash" ;;
      sh)      z_shebang="#!/bin/sh" ;;
      busybox) z_shebang="#!/busybox/sh" ;;
      python3) z_shebang="#!/usr/bin/env python3" ;;
      *)       buc_die "Unknown entrypoint '${z_entrypoint}' in recipe row: ${z_row}" ;;
    esac
    printf '%s\n%s' "${z_shebang}" "${z_body}" > "${z_escaped_file}" \
      || buc_die "Failed to write escaped step body for ${z_id}"

    jq \
      --arg name "${z_builder}" \
      --arg id "${z_id}" \
      --rawfile script "${z_escaped_file}" \
      '. + [{name: $name, id: $id, script: $script}]' \
      "${z_steps_file}" > "${z_steps_built}" \
      || buc_die "Failed to append step ${z_id}"
    mv "${z_steps_built}" "${z_steps_file}" \
      || buc_die "Failed to update steps JSON for ${z_id}"
  done

  buc_log_args "Composing ${z_label} Build resource JSON"
  local -r z_build_file="${z_temp_prefix}build.json"
  local -r z_mason_sa="projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/serviceAccounts/${RBGD_MASON_EMAIL}"

  jq -n \
    --slurpfile zjq_steps   "${z_steps_file}" \
    --slurpfile zjq_subs    "${z_subs_file}" \
    --arg       zjq_sa      "${z_mason_sa}" \
    --arg       zjq_pool    "${RBDC_POOL_TETHER}" \
    --arg       zjq_timeout "${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}" \
    '{
      steps: $zjq_steps[0],
      substitutions: $zjq_subs[0],
      serviceAccount: $zjq_sa,
      options: {
        automapSubstitutions: true,
        logging: "CLOUD_LOGGING_ONLY",
        pool: { name: $zjq_pool }
      },
      timeout: $zjq_timeout
    }' > "${z_build_file}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to compose ${z_label} build JSON"

  buc_log_args "${z_label} build JSON: ${z_build_file}"

  rbrd_check "${z_token}"

  buc_step "Submitting ${z_label} Cloud Build"
  rbuh_json "POST" "${ZRBFC_GCB_PROJECT_BUILDS_URL}" "${z_token}" \
    "lode_build_create" "${z_build_file}"
  rbuh_require_ok "${z_label} build submission" "lode_build_create"

  local z_build_id
  z_build_id=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "lode_build_create" '.metadata.build.id') \
    || buc_die "Failed to capture build ID from builds.create response"
  test -n "${z_build_id}" || buc_die "Build ID empty in builds.create response"
  echo "${z_build_id}" > "${ZRBFC_BUILD_ID_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to persist build ID"

  local -r z_console_url="${ZRBFC_CLOUD_QUERY_BASE};region=${RBGD_GCB_REGION}/${z_build_id}?project=${RBGD_GCB_PROJECT_ID}"
  buc_info "${z_label} Cloud Build submitted: ${z_build_id}"
  buc_link "Click to " "Open build in Cloud Console" "${z_console_url}"

  zrbfc_wait_build_completion "${z_poll_ceiling}" "${z_label}"
}

# Internal: decode the base64 JSON payload a step wrote to its buildStepOutputs
# slot into a destination file. The step index is the only generic parameter;
# what the decoded JSON means (its member-envelope shape) is the body's
# knowledge, not the spine's. Reads ZRBFC_BUILD_STATUS_FILE (the terminal build
# result registered by zrbfc_wait_build_completion).
# Args: step_index dest_file
zrbld_spine_extract() {
  zrbld_sentinel

  local -r z_step_index="${1:?Step index required}"
  local -r z_dest_file="${2:?Destination file required}"
  local -r z_b64_file="${z_dest_file}.b64"

  jq -r ".results.buildStepOutputs[${z_step_index}] // empty" "${ZRBFC_BUILD_STATUS_FILE}" \
    > "${z_b64_file}" || buc_die "Failed to extract buildStepOutputs[${z_step_index}] from build result"
  test -s "${z_b64_file}" || buc_die "No buildStepOutputs[${z_step_index}] in build result — step produced no output"

  rbgo_base64_decode_file_to_file "${z_b64_file}" "${z_dest_file}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to decode buildStepOutputs[${z_step_index}] base64"
  test -s "${z_dest_file}" || buc_die "Empty decoded buildStepOutputs[${z_step_index}]"
}

# eof

content.text: Now the abjure side, the honest LRO-poll reference, the Governor grants, and the posture home.

56	
57	  buc_require "Will jettison: ${z_locator}" "yes"
58	
59	  buc_step "Jettisoning: ${z_locator}"
60	
61	  # Jettison by tag reference
62	  local z_status_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}status.txt"
63	  local z_response_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}response.json"
64	  local z_stderr_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}stderr.txt"
65	
66	  rbuh_request "DELETE"                                                  \
67	                    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_pkg_path}/manifests/${z_tag}" \
68	                    "${z_token}"                                              \
69	                    "${z_response_file}" "${z_status_file}" "${z_stderr_file}" \
70	    || buc_die "DELETE request failed — see ${z_stderr_file}"
71	
72	  local z_http_code
73	  z_http_code=$(<"${z_status_file}")
74	  test -n "${z_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty"
75	
76	  if test "${z_http_code}" != "202" && test "${z_http_code}" != "204"; then
77	    local z_body="empty"
78	    if test -f "${z_response_file}"; then z_body=$(<"${z_response_file}"); fi
79	    buc_warn "Response body: ${z_body}"

86	rbfl_abjure() {

88	
89	  local z_hallmark="${BUZ_FOLIO:-}"
90	
91	  # Documentation block
92	  buc_doc_brief "Abjure a hallmark — delete all GAR packages under rbi_hm/<hallmark>/"
93	  buc_doc_param "hallmark" "Full hallmark (e.g., c260305133650-r260305160530)"

103	  # Each immediate child of the subtree is one ark (image, vouch, pouch,
104	  # about, attest, diags). Iterating discovered children rather than a

106	  local -r z_subtree="${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}/"
107	  buc_step "Enumerating packages under ${z_subtree}"

110	  local -r z_list_infix="rbfl_abjure_list"

117	  local -r z_resp_file="${ZRBUH_PREFIX}${z_list_infix}${ZRBUH_POSTFIX_JSON}"

130	  fi

132	  local z_count=0
133	  local z_count_line=""
134	  while IFS= read -r z_count_line || test -n "${z_count_line}"; do

136	  done < "${z_pkg_file}"

138	  local z_confirm_msg="Will abjure ${z_count} packages under ${z_subtree}:"
139	  local z_pkg_path=""

142	  done < "${z_pkg_file}"

144	
145	  # Delete each package via GAR REST API.
146	  # DELETE returns a long-running operation; trust 200 as accepted (matches
147	  # the prior fire-and-forget semantics with 202/204 on the v2 manifest API).
148	  local z_pkg_path=""
149	  local z_del_idx=0
150	  while IFS= read -r z_pkg_path || test -n "${z_pkg_path}"; do
151	    buc_step "Deleting package: ${z_pkg_path}"
152	
153	    local z_pkg_encoded="${z_pkg_path//\//%2F}"
154	    local z_del_url="${ZRBFC_GAR_API_BASE}/${ZRBFC_GAR_PACKAGE_BASE}/packages/${z_pkg_encoded}"
155	    local z_del_infix="rbfl_abjure_del_${z_del_idx}"

158	    rbuh_require_ok "Delete package ${z_pkg_path}" "${z_del_infix}"
159	
160	    buc_info "Deleted: ${z_pkg_path}"
161	    z_del_idx=$((z_del_idx + 1))
162	  done < "${z_pkg_file}"

#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# Recipe Bottle Foundry Ledger - delete cluster (guard-free, sourced by rbflk_):
# jettison a single image tag by locator, or abjure a whole hallmark subtree
# (Director credentials).

set -euo pipefail

######################################################################
# Delete (rbfl_*)

rbfl_jettison() {
  zrbfl_sentinel

  local z_locator="${BUZ_FOLIO:-}"

  # Documentation block
  buc_doc_brief "Jettison an image tag from the registry by locator"
  buc_doc_param "locator" "Image locator in package-path:tag format (e.g. rbi_hm/H/image:H)"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  # Validate locator parameter
  test -n "${z_locator}" || buc_die "Locator parameter required (package-path:tag)"

  # Parse locator into package path and tag
  case "${z_locator}" in
    *:*) : ;;
    *)   buc_die "Invalid locator format. Expected package-path:tag" ;;
  esac
  local z_pkg_path="${z_locator%:*}"
  local z_tag="${z_locator##*:}"
  test -n "${z_pkg_path}" || buc_die "Package path is empty in locator"
  test -n "${z_tag}" || buc_die "Tag is empty in locator"

  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"

  # Get OAuth token using Director credentials
  local z_token
  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"

  buc_require "Will jettison: ${z_locator}" "yes"

  buc_step "Jettisoning: ${z_locator}"

  # Jettison by tag reference
  local z_status_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}status.txt"
  local z_response_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}response.json"
  local z_stderr_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}stderr.txt"

  rbuh_request "DELETE"                                                  \
                    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_pkg_path}/manifests/${z_tag}" \
                    "${z_token}"                                              \
                    "${z_response_file}" "${z_status_file}" "${z_stderr_file}" \
    || buc_die "DELETE request failed — see ${z_stderr_file}"

  local z_http_code
  z_http_code=$(<"${z_status_file}")
  test -n "${z_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty"

  if test "${z_http_code}" != "202" && test "${z_http_code}" != "204"; then
    local z_body="empty"
    if test -f "${z_response_file}"; then z_body=$(<"${z_response_file}"); fi
    buc_warn "Response body: ${z_body}"
    buc_die "Jettison failed with HTTP ${z_http_code}"
  fi

  buc_success "Jettisoned or nonexistent: ${z_locator}"
}

rbfl_abjure() {
  zrbfl_sentinel

  local z_hallmark="${BUZ_FOLIO:-}"

  # Documentation block
  buc_doc_brief "Abjure a hallmark — delete all GAR packages under rbi_hm/<hallmark>/"
  buc_doc_param "hallmark" "Full hallmark (e.g., c260305133650-r260305160530)"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  test -n "${z_hallmark}" || buc_die "Hallmark parameter required"

  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
  local z_token
  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"

  # Enumerate packages under rbi_hm/<hallmark>/ via GAR REST API.
  # Each immediate child of the subtree is one ark (image, vouch, pouch,
  # about, attest, diags). Iterating discovered children rather than a
  # hardcoded suffix list naturally tolerates graft's missing pouch.
  local -r z_subtree="${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}/"
  buc_step "Enumerating packages under ${z_subtree}"

  local -r z_list_url="${ZRBFC_GAR_API_BASE}/${ZRBFC_GAR_PACKAGE_BASE}/packages?pageSize=1000"
  local -r z_list_infix="rbfl_abjure_list"

  rbuh_json "GET" "${z_list_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_list_infix}"
  rbuh_require_ok "List packages for abjure" "${z_list_infix}"

  # GAR returns package names URL-encoded in the resource name (slashes as
  # %2F); decode and prefix-match to the hallmark subtree.
  local -r z_resp_file="${ZRBUH_PREFIX}${z_list_infix}${ZRBUH_POSTFIX_JSON}"
  local -r z_pkg_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}packages.txt"

  jq -r --arg subtree "${z_subtree}" '
    .packages[]?.name
    | sub("^.*/packages/"; "")
    | gsub("%2F"; "/")
    | select(startswith($subtree))
  ' "${z_resp_file}" > "${z_pkg_file}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to extract package names for hallmark subtree"

  if ! test -s "${z_pkg_file}"; then
    buc_die "No packages found under ${z_subtree} — hallmark not present in registry"
  fi

  local z_count=0
  local z_count_line=""
  while IFS= read -r z_count_line || test -n "${z_count_line}"; do
    z_count=$((z_count + 1))
  done < "${z_pkg_file}"

  local z_confirm_msg="Will abjure ${z_count} packages under ${z_subtree}:"
  local z_pkg_path=""
  while IFS= read -r z_pkg_path || test -n "${z_pkg_path}"; do
    z_confirm_msg="${z_confirm_msg}\n  - ${z_pkg_path}"
  done < "${z_pkg_file}"
  buc_require "${z_confirm_msg}" "yes"

  # Delete each package via GAR REST API.
  # DELETE returns a long-running operation; trust 200 as accepted (matches
  # the prior fire-and-forget semantics with 202/204 on the v2 manifest API).
  local z_pkg_path=""
  local z_del_idx=0
  while IFS= read -r z_pkg_path || test -n "${z_pkg_path}"; do
    buc_step "Deleting package: ${z_pkg_path}"

    local z_pkg_encoded="${z_pkg_path//\//%2F}"
    local z_del_url="${ZRBFC_GAR_API_BASE}/${ZRBFC_GAR_PACKAGE_BASE}/packages/${z_pkg_encoded}"
    local z_del_infix="rbfl_abjure_del_${z_del_idx}"

    rbuh_json "DELETE" "${z_del_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_del_infix}"
    rbuh_require_ok "Delete package ${z_pkg_path}" "${z_del_infix}"

    buc_info "Deleted: ${z_pkg_path}"
    z_del_idx=$((z_del_idx + 1))
  done < "${z_pkg_file}"

  echo ""
  buc_success "Hallmark abjured: ${z_hallmark} (${z_count} packages)"
}

# eof

15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle Google REST - LRO polling and API-enable patterns over rbuh
20	
21	set -euo pipefail
22	
23	# Multiple inclusion detection
24	test -z "${ZRBGE_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbge multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
25	ZRBGE_SOURCED=1
26	
27	######################################################################
28	# Internal Functions (zrbge_*)
29	
30	zrbge_kindle() {
31	  test -z "${ZRBGE_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbge already kindled"
32	
33	  # Ensure dependency kindled first (rbuh owns the HTTP temp-file machinery rbge consumes)
34	  zrbuh_sentinel
35	
36	  readonly ZRBGE_KINDLED=1
37	}
38	
39	zrbge_sentinel() {
40	  test "${ZRBGE_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbge not kindled - call zrbge_kindle first"
41	}
42	
43	######################################################################
44	# Capture Functions
45	
46	rbge_error_message_capture() {
47	  zrbge_sentinel
48	  local -r z_infix="${1:-}"
49	  test -n "${z_infix}" || return 1
50	
51	  if rbuh_json_valid_predicate "${z_infix}"; then
52	    rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" '.error.message' 2>/dev/null || return 1
53	  else
54	    return 1
55	  fi
56	}
57	
58	######################################################################
59	# External / RBTOE Pattern Functions
60	
61	# Predicate: Check if resource was newly created and apply propagation delay
62	rbge_newly_created_delay() {
63	  zrbge_sentinel
64	
65	  local -r z_infix="${1}"
66	  local -r z_resource="${2}"
67	  local -r z_delay="${3}"
68	
69	  local z_code
70	  z_code=$(rbuh_code_capture "${z_infix}") || return 1
71	
72	  if test "${z_code}" = "200" || test "${z_code}" = "201"; then
73	    buc_step "Resource ${z_resource} newly created, waiting ${z_delay}s for propagation"
74	    sleep "${z_delay}"
75	  fi
76	}
77	
78	# POST + strict LRO handling (no heuristics)
79	rbge_lro_ok() {
80	  zrbge_sentinel
81	
82	  local -r z_label="${1}"
83	  local -r z_token="${2}"
84	  local -r z_post_url="${3}"
85	  local -r z_infix="${4}"
86	  local -r z_body="${5}"
87	  local -r z_name_jq="${6}"
88	  local -r z_poll_root="${7}"
89	  local -r z_op_prefix="${8}"
90	  local -r z_poll_interval="${9:-${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}}"
91	  local -r z_timeout="${10:-${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}}"
92	
93	  buc_log_args '1) POST the request'
94	  rbuh_json "POST" "${z_post_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}" "${z_body}"
95	  rbuh_require_ok "${z_label}" "${z_infix}"
96	
97	  local z_done=""
98	  z_done=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" ".done") || z_done=""
99	  test "${z_done}" = "true" && {
100	    local z_lro_error=""
101	    z_lro_error=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" '.error.message // empty') || z_lro_error=""
102	    if test -n "${z_lro_error}"; then
103	      local z_lro_resp_file="${ZRBUH_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBUH_POSTFIX_JSON}"
104	      buc_warn "${z_label}: LRO completed with error — response saved: ${z_lro_resp_file}"
105	      buc_die "${z_label}: ${z_lro_error}"
106	    fi
107	    buc_log_args 'Immediate-done response -> success (no polling)'
108	    return 0
109	  }
110	
111	  buc_log_args '2) Extract op name (or return if not an LRO)'
112	  local z_name
113	  z_name=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" "${z_name_jq}") || z_name=""
114	  test -n "${z_name}" || {
115	    buc_log_args 'No LRO name present - treat as non-LRO success'
116	    return 0
117	  }
118	  buc_log_args '3) Build poll URL based on operation name format'
119	  local z_poll_url
120	  if [[ "${z_name}" =~ ^projects/.*/locations/.*/operations/ ]]; then
121	    buc_log_args '  Regional operation with fully-qualified name'
122	    z_poll_url="${z_poll_root}/${z_name}"
123	  elif [[ "${z_name}" =~ ^projects/.*/operations/ ]]; then
124	    buc_log_args '  Global operation with project prefix'
125	    z_poll_url="${z_poll_root}/${z_name}"
126	  elif test -n "${z_op_prefix}" && [[ ! "${z_name}" =~ ^${z_op_prefix} ]]; then
127	    buc_log_args '  Legacy format - apply prefix (not already present)'
128	    z_poll_url="${z_poll_root}/${z_op_prefix}${z_name}"
129	  else
130	    buc_log_args '  Use name as-is under versioned root'
131	    z_poll_url="${z_poll_root}/${z_name}"
132	  fi
133	  buc_log_args "Poll URL: ${z_poll_url}"
134	
135	  buc_log_args '4) Poll until done or timeout'
136	  local z_elapsed=0
137	  while :; do
138	    sleep "${z_poll_interval}"
139	    z_elapsed=$((z_elapsed + z_poll_interval))
140	
141	    local z_poll_infix="${z_infix}-poll-${z_elapsed}s"
142	    rbuh_json "GET" "${z_poll_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_poll_infix}"
143	
144	    local z_code=""
145	    z_code=$(rbuh_code_capture "${z_poll_infix}") || z_code=""
146	    test "${z_code}" = "200" || buc_die "${z_label}: poll failed (HTTP ${z_code})"
147	
148	    z_done=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_poll_infix}" ".done") || z_done=""
149	    test "${z_done}" = "true" && {
150	      local z_lro_error=""
151	      z_lro_error=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_poll_infix}" '.error.message // empty') || z_lro_error=""
152	      if test -n "${z_lro_error}"; then
153	        local z_lro_resp_file="${ZRBUH_PREFIX}${z_poll_infix}${ZRBUH_POSTFIX_JSON}"
154	        buc_warn "${z_label}: LRO completed with error — response saved: ${z_lro_resp_file}"
155	        buc_die "${z_label}: ${z_lro_error}"
156	      fi
157	      buc_log_args "${z_label}: operation completed after ${z_elapsed}s"
158	      return 0
159	    }
160	
161	    test "${z_elapsed}" -ge "${z_timeout}" && buc_die "${z_label}: timeout after ${z_timeout}s"
162	    buc_log_args "Still running at ${z_elapsed}s..."
163	  done
164	}
165	
166	# RBTOE: API Enable Pattern
167	# Ensures a specified Google Cloud API is enabled in a project with idempotent behavior
168	rbge_api_enable() {
169	  zrbge_sentinel
170	
171	  local -r z_api_service="${1}"
172	  local -r z_project_id="${2}"
173	  local -r z_token="${3}"
174	
175	  test -n "${z_api_service}" || buc_die "rbge_api_enable: API service name required"
176	  test -n "${z_project_id}" || buc_die "rbge_api_enable: project ID required"
177	  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "rbge_api_enable: access token required"
178	
179	  buc_log_args "Enabling API ${z_api_service} in project ${z_project_id}"
180	
181	  local -r z_infix="api-enable-${z_api_service}"
182	  local -r z_enable_url="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com/v1/projects/${z_project_id}/services/${z_api_service}.googleapis.com:enable"
183	
184	  # Attempt to enable the API
185	  rbuh_json "POST" "${z_enable_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}" ""
186	
187	  local z_code
188	  z_code=$(rbuh_code_capture "${z_infix}") || buc_die "rbge_api_enable: failed to read HTTP code"
189	
190	  case "${z_code}" in
191	    200|201|204)
192	      buc_log_args "API enable request successful (HTTP ${z_code})"
193	      ;;
194	    400)
195	      # Check if already enabled
196	      local z_err
197	      z_err=$(rbge_error_message_capture "${z_infix}") || z_err="Unknown error"
198	      if [[ "${z_err}" =~ already.enabled ]] || [[ "${z_err}" =~ "already enabled" ]]; then
199	        buc_log_args "API ${z_api_service} already enabled"
200	        return 0
201	      else
202	        buc_die "rbge_api_enable (HTTP ${z_code}): ${z_err}"
203	      fi
204	      ;;
205	    *)
206	      local z_err
207	      z_err=$(rbge_error_message_capture "${z_infix}") || z_err="Unknown error"
208	      buc_die "rbge_api_enable (HTTP ${z_code}): ${z_err}"
209	      ;;
210	  esac
211	
212	  # Check if this returned an LRO that needs polling
213	  local z_operation_name
214	  z_operation_name=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" ".name") || z_operation_name=""
215	
216	  if test -n "${z_operation_name}"; then
217	    buc_log_args "API enable returned LRO, polling for completion"
218	    # Use the LRO polling mechanism
219	    local -r z_poll_root="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com/v1"
220	    rbge_lro_ok \
221	      "API Enable ${z_api_service}" \
222	      "${z_token}" \
223	      "${z_enable_url}" \
224	      "${z_infix}" \
225	      "" \
226	      ".name" \
227	      "${z_poll_root}" \
228	      ""
229	  fi
230	
231	  # Verify API is enabled
232	  local -r z_verify_infix="api-verify-${z_api_service}"
233	  local -r z_verify_url="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com/v1/projects/${z_project_id}/services/${z_api_service}.googleapis.com"
234	
235	  rbuh_json "GET" "${z_verify_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_verify_infix}" ""
236	  rbuh_require_ok "API Enable Verify ${z_api_service}" "${z_verify_infix}"
237	
238	  local z_state
239	  z_state=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_verify_infix}" ".state") || buc_die "Failed to read API state"
240	
241	  if test "${z_state}" != "ENABLED"; then
242	    buc_die "API ${z_api_service} not enabled after request (state: ${z_state})"
243	  fi
244	
245	  buc_log_args "API ${z_api_service} confirmed enabled"
246	}
247	
248	# eof

#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# Recipe Bottle Google REST - LRO polling and API-enable patterns over rbuh

set -euo pipefail

# Multiple inclusion detection
test -z "${ZRBGE_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbge multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
ZRBGE_SOURCED=1

######################################################################
# Internal Functions (zrbge_*)

zrbge_kindle() {
  test -z "${ZRBGE_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbge already kindled"

  # Ensure dependency kindled first (rbuh owns the HTTP temp-file machinery rbge consumes)
  zrbuh_sentinel

  readonly ZRBGE_KINDLED=1
}

zrbge_sentinel() {
  test "${ZRBGE_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbge not kindled - call zrbge_kindle first"
}

######################################################################
# Capture Functions

rbge_error_message_capture() {
  zrbge_sentinel
  local -r z_infix="${1:-}"
  test -n "${z_infix}" || return 1

  if rbuh_json_valid_predicate "${z_infix}"; then
    rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" '.error.message' 2>/dev/null || return 1
  else
    return 1
  fi
}

######################################################################
# External / RBTOE Pattern Functions

# Predicate: Check if resource was newly created and apply propagation delay
rbge_newly_created_delay() {
  zrbge_sentinel

  local -r z_infix="${1}"
  local -r z_resource="${2}"
  local -r z_delay="${3}"

  local z_code
  z_code=$(rbuh_code_capture "${z_infix}") || return 1

  if test "${z_code}" = "200" || test "${z_code}" = "201"; then
    buc_step "Resource ${z_resource} newly created, waiting ${z_delay}s for propagation"
    sleep "${z_delay}"
  fi
}

# POST + strict LRO handling (no heuristics)
rbge_lro_ok() {
  zrbge_sentinel

  local -r z_label="${1}"
  local -r z_token="${2}"
  local -r z_post_url="${3}"
  local -r z_infix="${4}"
  local -r z_body="${5}"
  local -r z_name_jq="${6}"
  local -r z_poll_root="${7}"
  local -r z_op_prefix="${8}"
  local -r z_poll_interval="${9:-${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}}"
  local -r z_timeout="${10:-${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}}"

  buc_log_args '1) POST the request'
  rbuh_json "POST" "${z_post_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}" "${z_body}"
  rbuh_require_ok "${z_label}" "${z_infix}"

  local z_done=""
  z_done=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" ".done") || z_done=""
  test "${z_done}" = "true" && {
    local z_lro_error=""
    z_lro_error=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" '.error.message // empty') || z_lro_error=""
    if test -n "${z_lro_error}"; then
      local z_lro_resp_file="${ZRBUH_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBUH_POSTFIX_JSON}"
      buc_warn "${z_label}: LRO completed with error — response saved: ${z_lro_resp_file}"
      buc_die "${z_label}: ${z_lro_error}"
    fi
    buc_log_args 'Immediate-done response -> success (no polling)'
    return 0
  }

  buc_log_args '2) Extract op name (or return if not an LRO)'
  local z_name
  z_name=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" "${z_name_jq}") || z_name=""
  test -n "${z_name}" || {
    buc_log_args 'No LRO name present - treat as non-LRO success'
    return 0
  }
  buc_log_args '3) Build poll URL based on operation name format'
  local z_poll_url
  if [[ "${z_name}" =~ ^projects/.*/locations/.*/operations/ ]]; then
    buc_log_args '  Regional operation with fully-qualified name'
    z_poll_url="${z_poll_root}/${z_name}"
  elif [[ "${z_name}" =~ ^projects/.*/operations/ ]]; then
    buc_log_args '  Global operation with project prefix'
    z_poll_url="${z_poll_root}/${z_name}"
  elif test -n "${z_op_prefix}" && [[ ! "${z_name}" =~ ^${z_op_prefix} ]]; then
    buc_log_args '  Legacy format - apply prefix (not already present)'
    z_poll_url="${z_poll_root}/${z_op_prefix}${z_name}"
  else
    buc_log_args '  Use name as-is under versioned root'
    z_poll_url="${z_poll_root}/${z_name}"
  fi
  buc_log_args "Poll URL: ${z_poll_url}"

  buc_log_args '4) Poll until done or timeout'
  local z_elapsed=0
  while :; do
    sleep "${z_poll_interval}"
    z_elapsed=$((z_elapsed + z_poll_interval))

    local z_poll_infix="${z_infix}-poll-${z_elapsed}s"
    rbuh_json "GET" "${z_poll_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_poll_infix}"

    local z_code=""
    z_code=$(rbuh_code_capture "${z_poll_infix}") || z_code=""
    test "${z_code}" = "200" || buc_die "${z_label}: poll failed (HTTP ${z_code})"

    z_done=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_poll_infix}" ".done") || z_done=""
    test "${z_done}" = "true" && {
      local z_lro_error=""
      z_lro_error=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_poll_infix}" '.error.message // empty') || z_lro_error=""
      if test -n "${z_lro_error}"; then
        local z_lro_resp_file="${ZRBUH_PREFIX}${z_poll_infix}${ZRBUH_POSTFIX_JSON}"
        buc_warn "${z_label}: LRO completed with error — response saved: ${z_lro_resp_file}"
        buc_die "${z_label}: ${z_lro_error}"
      fi
      buc_log_args "${z_label}: operation completed after ${z_elapsed}s"
      return 0
    }

    test "${z_elapsed}" -ge "${z_timeout}" && buc_die "${z_label}: timeout after ${z_timeout}s"
    buc_log_args "Still running at ${z_elapsed}s..."
  done
}

# RBTOE: API Enable Pattern
# Ensures a specified Google Cloud API is enabled in a project with idempotent behavior
rbge_api_enable() {
  zrbge_sentinel

  local -r z_api_service="${1}"
  local -r z_project_id="${2}"
  local -r z_token="${3}"

  test -n "${z_api_service}" || buc_die "rbge_api_enable: API service name required"
  test -n "${z_project_id}" || buc_die "rbge_api_enable: project ID required"
  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "rbge_api_enable: access token required"

  buc_log_args "Enabling API ${z_api_service} in project ${z_project_id}"

  local -r z_infix="api-enable-${z_api_service}"
  local -r z_enable_url="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com/v1/projects/${z_project_id}/services/${z_api_service}.googleapis.com:enable"

  # Attempt to enable the API
  rbuh_json "POST" "${z_enable_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}" ""

  local z_code
  z_code=$(rbuh_code_capture "${z_infix}") || buc_die "rbge_api_enable: failed to read HTTP code"

  case "${z_code}" in
    200|201|204)
      buc_log_args "API enable request successful (HTTP ${z_code})"
      ;;
    400)
      # Check if already enabled
      local z_err
      z_err=$(rbge_error_message_capture "${z_infix}") || z_err="Unknown error"
      if [[ "${z_err}" =~ already.enabled ]] || [[ "${z_err}" =~ "already enabled" ]]; then
        buc_log_args "API ${z_api_service} already enabled"
        return 0
      else
        buc_die "rbge_api_enable (HTTP ${z_code}): ${z_err}"
      fi
      ;;
    *)
      local z_err
      z_err=$(rbge_error_message_capture "${z_infix}") || z_err="Unknown error"
      buc_die "rbge_api_enable (HTTP ${z_code}): ${z_err}"
      ;;
  esac

  # Check if this returned an LRO that needs polling
  local z_operation_name
  z_operation_name=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" ".name") || z_operation_name=""

  if test -n "${z_operation_name}"; then
    buc_log_args "API enable returned LRO, polling for completion"
    # Use the LRO polling mechanism
    local -r z_poll_root="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com/v1"
    rbge_lro_ok \
      "API Enable ${z_api_service}" \
      "${z_token}" \
      "${z_enable_url}" \
      "${z_infix}" \
      "" \
      ".name" \
      "${z_poll_root}" \
      ""
  fi

  # Verify API is enabled
  local -r z_verify_infix="api-verify-${z_api_service}"
  local -r z_verify_url="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com/v1/projects/${z_project_id}/services/${z_api_service}.googleapis.com"

  rbuh_json "GET" "${z_verify_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_verify_infix}" ""
  rbuh_require_ok "API Enable Verify ${z_api_service}" "${z_verify_infix}"

  local z_state
  z_state=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_verify_infix}" ".state") || buc_die "Failed to read API state"

  if test "${z_state}" != "ENABLED"; then
    buc_die "API ${z_api_service} not enabled after request (state: ${z_state})"
  fi

  buc_log_args "API ${z_api_service} confirmed enabled"
}

# eof

1	#!/bin/bash
2	#
3	# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
4	#
5	# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
6	# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
7	# You may obtain a copy of the License at
8	#
9	#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
10	#
11	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
12	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
13	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle GCP Governor - Project Orchestration
20	
21	
22	# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
23	# Operational Invariants (RBGG is single writer; 409 is fatal)
24	#
25	# - Single admin actor: All RBGG operations are executed by a single admin
26	#   identity. There are no concurrent writers in the same project.
27	# - Pristine-state expectation: RBGG init/creation flows assume the project
28	#   is pristine for the resources they manage. If a resource "already exists"
29	#   (HTTP 409), that's treated as state drift or prior manual activity.
30	# - Policy: All HTTP 409 Conflict responses are fatal (buc_die). We do not
31	#   treat 409 as idempotent success anywhere in RBGG.
32	#   If you see a 409, resolve state drift first (destroy/reset), then rerun.
33	# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
34	
35	set -euo pipefail
36	
37	# Multiple inclusion detection
38	test -z "${ZRBGG_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgg multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
39	ZRBGG_SOURCED=1
40	
41	######################################################################
42	# Internal Functions (zrbgg_*)
43	
44	zrbgg_kindle() {
45	  test -z "${ZRBGG_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgg already kindled"
46	
47	  test -n "${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID:-}"     || buc_die "RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is not set"
48	  test   "${#RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" -gt 0 || buc_die "RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is empty"
49	
50	  buc_log_args 'Ensure dependencies are kindled first'
51	  zrbgc_sentinel
52	  zrbgo_sentinel
53	  zrbuh_sentinel
54	  zrbgi_sentinel
55	
56	  readonly ZRBGG_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgg_"
57	  readonly ZRBGG_EMPTY_JSON="${ZRBGG_PREFIX}empty.json"
58	  printf '{}' > "${ZRBGG_EMPTY_JSON}"
59	
60	  # Infix values for HTTP operations
61	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_CREATE="create"
62	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_PREFLIGHT="preflight"
63	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_VERIFY="verify"
64	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_KEY="key"
65	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_KEY_DELETE="key_delete"
66	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_API_IAM_ENABLE="api_iam_enable"
67	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_API_CRM_ENABLE="api_crm_enable"
68	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_API_ART_ENABLE="api_art_enable"
69	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_API_BUILD_ENABLE="api_build_enable"
70	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_CB_SA_ACCOUNT_GEN="cb_account_gen"
71	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_CB_PRIME="cb_prime"
72	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_API_CONTAINERANALYSIS_ENABLE="api_containeranalysis_enable"
73	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_API_STORAGE_ENABLE="api_storage_enable"
74	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_INFO="project_info"
75	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_CREATE_REPO="create_repo"
76	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_VERIFY_REPO="verify_repo"
77	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_DELETE_REPO="delete_repo"
78	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_REPO_POLICY="repo_policy"
79	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_RPOLICY_SET="repo_policy_set"
80	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_ROSTER="roster"
81	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_API_CHECK="api_checking"
82	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_DELETE="delete"
83	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_DELETE_GONE="delete_gone"
84	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_LIST_KEYS="list_keys"
85	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_CREATE="bucket_create"
86	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_DELETE="bucket_delete"
87	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_LIST="bucket_list"
88	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_OBJECT_DELETE="object_delete"
89	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_LIST_LIENS="list_liens"
90	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_DELETE="project_delete"
91	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_STATE="project_state"
92	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_RESTORE="project_restore"
93	
94	  readonly ZRBGG_KINDLED=1
95	}
96	
97	zrbgg_sentinel() {
98	  test "${ZRBGG_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgg not kindled - call zrbgg_kindle first"
99	}
100	
101	# Path-driven sibling of rbuh_json_field_capture for files that live outside
102	# the rbgu cache (under RBRR_SECRETS_DIR/assay/* for credential bytes that
103	# must not leak into BURD_TEMP_DIR).
104	zrbgg_secrets_json_field_capture() {
105	  zrbgg_sentinel
106	  local -r z_path="${1}"
107	  local -r z_jq="${2}"
108	  local z_result
109	  z_result=$(jq -r "${z_jq}" "${z_path}")  || return 1
110	  if test -z "${z_result}" || test "${z_result}" = "null"; then return 1; fi
111	  echo "${z_result}"
112	}
113	
114	######################################################################
115	######################################################################
116	# Capture: list required services that are NOT enabled (blank = all enabled)
117	zrbgg_required_apis_missing_capture() {
118	  zrbgg_sentinel
119	
120	  local z_token="${1:-}"
121	  test -n "${z_token}" || { echo ""; return 1; }
122	
123	  local z_missing=""
124	  local z_api=""
125	  local z_service=""
126	  local z_infix=""
127	  local z_state=""
128	  local z_code=""
129	
130	  for z_api in                       \
131	    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_CRM}"      \
132	    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_GAR}"      \
133	    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_IAM}"      \
134	    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_BUILD}"    \
135	    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_ANALYSIS}" \
136	    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_STORAGE}"
137	  do
138	    z_service="${z_api##*/}"
139	    z_infix="${ZRBGG_INFIX_API_CHECK}_${z_service}"
140	
141	    rbuh_json "GET" "${z_api}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}" || true
142	
143	    buc_log_args 'If we cannot even read an HTTP code file, that is a processing failure.'
144	    z_code=$(rbuh_code_capture "${z_infix}") || z_code=""
145	    test -n "${z_code}" || return 1
146	
147	    if test "${z_code}" = "200"; then
148	      z_state=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" ".state") || z_state=""
149	      test "${z_state}" = "ENABLED" || z_missing="${z_missing} ${z_service}"
150	    else
151	      buc_log_args 'Any non-200 (403/404/5xx/etc) => treat as NOT enabled'
152	      z_missing="${z_missing} ${z_service}"
153	    fi
154	  done
155	
156	  printf '%s' "${z_missing# }"
157	}

159	zrbgg_create_service_account_with_key() {
160	  zrbgg_sentinel
161	
162	  local z_account_name="$1"
163	  local z_display_name="$2"
164	  local z_description="$3"
165	  local z_role="$4"
166	
167	  local z_account_email="${z_account_name}@${RBGD_SA_EMAIL_FULL}"
168	
169	  buc_step 'Get OAuth token from admin'
170	  local z_token
171	  z_token=$(rba_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"
172	
173	  buc_step "Preflight: does ${z_account_name} already exist?"
174	  # Idempotent establish (RBSRK/RBSDK): a pre-existing SA is not drift — keep the
175	  # identity (email + uid + its IAM bindings) and rotate only the key below. When
176	  # absent, create the SA first. Either branch ends with exactly one fresh key.
177	  rbuh_json "GET" "${RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}/${z_account_email}" "${z_token}" \
178	                                                 "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PREFLIGHT}"
179	  local z_preflight_code
180	  z_preflight_code=$(rbuh_code_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PREFLIGHT}") || z_preflight_code=""
181	  local z_sa_exists=0
182	  case "${z_preflight_code}" in
183	    404) buc_log_args "Service account ${z_account_email} absent — will create" ;;
184	    200) z_sa_exists=1; buc_log_args "Service account ${z_account_email} exists — establishing key only (SA and bindings untouched)" ;;
185	    *)   buc_die "Preflight GET for ${z_account_email} returned unexpected HTTP ${z_preflight_code}" ;;
186	  esac
187	
188	  local z_sa_uid=""
189	  if test "${z_sa_exists}" = "0"; then
190	    buc_step "Create request JSON for ${z_account_name}"
191	    jq -n                                      \
192	      --arg account_id "${z_account_name}"     \
193	      --arg display_name "${z_display_name}"   \
194	      --arg description "${z_description}"     \
195	      '{
196	        accountId: $account_id,
197	        serviceAccount: {
198	          displayName: $display_name,
199	          description: $description
200	        }
201	      }' > "${ZRBGG_PREFIX}create_request.json" || buc_die "Failed to create request JSON"
202	
203	    buc_step 'Create service account via REST API'
204	    rbuh_json "POST" "${RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}" "${z_token}" \
205	      "${ZRBGG_INFIX_CREATE}" "${ZRBGG_PREFIX}create_request.json"
206	    rbuh_require_ok "Create service account" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_CREATE}"
207	
208	    z_sa_uid=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_CREATE}" '.uniqueId') \
209	      || buc_die "Failed to get uniqueId from SA creation response"
210	    buc_info "Service account created: ${z_account_email} (uid: ${z_sa_uid})"
211	
212	    rbuh_poll_until_ok "SA propagation (by email)" \
213	      "${RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}/${z_account_email}" "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_VERIFY}"
214	  else
215	    z_sa_uid=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PREFLIGHT}" '.uniqueId') \
216	      || buc_die "Failed to get uniqueId from existing SA"
217	    buc_info "Service account exists: ${z_account_email} (uid: ${z_sa_uid})"
218	  fi
219	
220	  buc_step 'List existing USER_MANAGED keys (before blunt-kill)'
221	
222	  # Subresource read-path can lag SA email-path readiness — flap observed
223	  # 200→200→404 on freshly-minted depots. Retry on the actual call, not a
224	  # proxy probe (see RBSCIP "SA keys subresource propagation").
225	  local z_list_attempt=0
226	  local z_list_infix=""
227	  local z_list_code=""
228	  while :; do
229	    z_list_attempt=$((z_list_attempt + 1))
230	    z_list_infix="${ZRBGG_INFIX_LIST_KEYS}-attempt${z_list_attempt}"
231	    rbuh_json "GET"                                                        \
232	      "${RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}/${z_account_email}${RBGC_PATH_KEYS}"        \
233	                                        "${z_token}" "${z_list_infix}"
234	
235	    z_list_code=$(rbuh_code_capture "${z_list_infix}") || z_list_code=""
236	
237	    if test "${z_list_code}" = "200"; then
238	      break
239	    fi
240	
241	    if test "${z_list_code}" = "404" && test "${z_list_attempt}" -lt "${RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_MAX}"; then
242	      buc_warn "keys.list returned 404 (SA read-path propagation delay), retry ${z_list_attempt}/${RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_MAX} in ${RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_DELAY_SEC}s..."
243	      sleep "${RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_DELAY_SEC}"
244	      continue
245	    fi
246	
247	    rbuh_require_ok "List service account keys" "${z_list_infix}"
248	  done
249	
250	  buc_step 'Blunt-kill: delete every existing USER_MANAGED key before minting'
251	  # Re-key rotates the Key lifecycle only — the SA and its IAM bindings were left
252	  # untouched above. Delete all user-managed keys so exactly one fresh key exists
253	  # when this returns; a 404 on a key already gone is idempotent.
254	  local -r z_key_names_file="${ZRBGG_PREFIX}usermanaged_key_names.txt"
255	  jq -r '.keys[]? | select(.keyType=="USER_MANAGED") | .name' \
256	    "${ZRBUH_PREFIX}${z_list_infix}${ZRBUH_POSTFIX_JSON}" > "${z_key_names_file}" \
257	    || buc_die "Failed to extract USER_MANAGED key names"
258	
259	  local z_key_names=()
260	  local z_key_line=""
261	  while IFS= read -r z_key_line || test -n "${z_key_line}"; do
262	    test -n "${z_key_line}" || continue
263	    z_key_names+=("${z_key_line}")
264	  done < "${z_key_names_file}"
265	
266	  local z_key_del_index=0
267	  local z_key_del_infix=""
268	  local z_key_del_code=""
269	  local z_i=0
270	  for z_i in "${!z_key_names[@]}"; do
271	    z_key_del_index=$((z_key_del_index + 1))
272	    z_key_del_infix="${ZRBGG_INFIX_KEY_DELETE}-${z_key_del_index}"
273	    buc_log_args "Deleting USER_MANAGED key ${z_key_names[$z_i]}"
274	    rbuh_json "DELETE" "${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/${z_key_names[$z_i]}" \
275	      "${z_token}" "${z_key_del_infix}"
276	    z_key_del_code=$(rbuh_code_capture "${z_key_del_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from key delete"
277	    case "${z_key_del_code}" in
278	      200|204) buc_log_args "Deleted key ${z_key_names[$z_i]}" ;;
279	      404)     buc_log_args "Key ${z_key_names[$z_i]} already gone (404) — idempotent" ;;
280	      *)       rbuh_require_ok "Delete USER_MANAGED key" "${z_key_del_infix}" ;;
281	    esac
282	  done
283	
284	  buc_step 'Generate service account key (with propagation retry)'
285	  local z_key_req="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgg_key_request.json"
286	  printf '%s' '{"privateKeyType": "TYPE_GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_FILE"}' > "${z_key_req}"
287	
288	  local z_key_attempt=0
289	  local z_key_infix=""
290	  local z_key_code=""
291	  while :; do
292	    z_key_attempt=$((z_key_attempt + 1))
293	    z_key_infix="${ZRBGG_INFIX_KEY}-attempt${z_key_attempt}"
294	    rbuh_json "POST" "${RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}/${z_account_email}${RBGC_PATH_KEYS}" \
295	                                           "${z_token}" "${z_key_infix}" "${z_key_req}"
296	
297	    z_key_code=$(rbuh_code_capture "${z_key_infix}") || z_key_code=""
298	
299	    if test "${z_key_code}" = "200"; then
300	      break
301	    fi
302	
303	    if test "${z_key_code}" = "404" && test "${z_key_attempt}" -lt "${RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_MAX}"; then
304	      buc_warn "keys.create returned 404 (SA write-path propagation delay), retry ${z_key_attempt}/${RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_MAX} in ${RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_DELAY_SEC}s..."
305	      sleep "${RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_DELAY_SEC}"
306	      continue
307	    fi
308	
309	    rbuh_require_ok "Generate service account key" "${z_key_infix}"
310	  done
311	
312	  buc_step 'Extract and decode key data'
313	  local z_key_b64
314	  z_key_b64=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_key_infix}" '.privateKeyData') \
315	    || buc_die "Failed to extract privateKeyData"
316	  # Decode into the assay subdirectory (RBRR_SECRETS_DIR/assay/) so the
317	  # only readable form of the private key shares lifecycle and location
318	  # with the final RBRA file — credentials never leak into BURD_TEMP_DIR.
319	  local -r z_assay_dir="${RBDC_ASSAY_RBRA_FILE%/*}"
320	  local -r z_key_json="${z_assay_dir}/_decoded_key_${z_account_name}.json"
321	  rbgo_base64_decode_string_to_file "${z_key_b64}" "${z_key_json}" \
322	    || buc_die "Failed to decode key data"
323	
324	  buc_step 'Convert JSON key to RBRA format'
325	  local z_rbra_file="${RBDC_ASSAY_RBRA_FILE}"
326	
327	  local z_client_email
328	  z_client_email=$(zrbgg_secrets_json_field_capture "${z_key_json}" '.client_email') \
329	    || buc_die "Failed to extract client_email from key JSON"
330	
331	  local z_private_key
332	  z_private_key=$(zrbgg_secrets_json_field_capture "${z_key_json}" '.private_key') \
333	    || buc_die "Failed to extract private_key from key JSON"
334	
335	  local z_project_id
336	  z_project_id=$(zrbgg_secrets_json_field_capture "${z_key_json}" '.project_id') \
337	    || buc_die "Failed to extract project_id from key JSON"
338	
339	  buc_step 'Write RBRA file' "${z_rbra_file}"
340	  # CAUTION: jq -r unescapes JSON \n to real newlines, so z_private_key holds a
341	  # multi-line PEM string. printf '%s' below preserves real newlines into the
342	  # RBRA file. Consumer (rbgo_OAuth.sh:zrbgo_build_jwt_capture) tolerates either
343	  # real-newline or '\n'-escape form via printf '%b'; do not "normalize" to one
344	  # form without auditing the consumer.
345	  {
346	    printf 'RBRA_ROLE=%s\n'                  "${z_role}"
347	    printf 'RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL="%s"\n'      "${z_client_email}"
348	    printf 'RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY="'; printf '%s' "${z_private_key}"; printf '"\n'
349	    printf 'RBRA_PROJECT_ID="%s"\n'        "${z_project_id}"
350	    printf 'RBRA_TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC=1800\n'
351	  } > "${z_rbra_file}" || buc_die "Failed to write RBRA file ${z_rbra_file}"
352	
353	  test -f "${z_rbra_file}" || buc_die "Failed to write RBRA file ${z_rbra_file}"
354	
355	  # Decoded JSON lives in RBRR_SECRETS_DIR (not BURD_TEMP_DIR), so
356	  # BCG:518's no-module-temp-deletion rule does not bind. Remove now
357	  # that the bytes are persisted in RBRA form.
358	  rm -f "${z_key_json}"
359	
360	  buc_info "RBRA file written: ${z_rbra_file}"
361	
362	  # Echo uniqueId to stdout for callers (all logging goes to stderr per BCG)
363	  printf '%s' "${z_sa_uid}"
364	}

366	zrbgg_create_gcs_bucket() {
367	  zrbgg_sentinel
368	
369	  local z_token="${1}"
370	  local z_bucket_name="${2}"
371	
372	  buc_log_args 'Create bucket request JSON for '"${z_bucket_name}"
373	  local z_bucket_req="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgg_bucket_create_req.json"
374	  jq -n --arg name "${z_bucket_name}" --arg location "${RBGC_GAR_LOCATION}" '
375	{
376	  name: $name,
377	  location: $location,
378	  storageClass: "STANDARD",
379	  lifecycle: { rule: [ { action: { type: "Delete" }, condition: { age: 1 } } ] }
380	}' > "${z_bucket_req}" || buc_die "Failed to create bucket request JSON"
381	
382	  buc_log_args 'Send bucket creation request'
383	  local z_code
384	  local z_err
385	  rbuh_json "POST" "${RBGD_API_GCS_BUCKET_CREATE}" "${z_token}" \
386	                                  "${ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_CREATE}" "${z_bucket_req}"
387	  z_code=$(rbuh_code_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_CREATE}") || buc_die "Bad bucket creation HTTP code"
388	  z_err=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_CREATE}" '.error.message') || z_err="HTTP ${z_code}"
389	
390	  case "${z_code}" in
391	    200|201) buc_info "Bucket ${z_bucket_name} created";                    return 0 ;;
392	    409)     buc_die  "Bucket ${z_bucket_name} already exists (pristine-state violation)" ;;
393	    *)       buc_die  "Failed to create bucket: ${z_err}"                             ;;
394	  esac
395	}

397	zrbgg_list_bucket_objects_capture() {
398	  zrbgg_sentinel
399	
400	  local z_token="${1}"
401	  local z_bucket_name="${2}"
402	
403	  local z_list_url_base="${RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE}${RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1}/b/${z_bucket_name}/o"
404	  local z_page_token=""
405	  local z_first=1
406	
407	  while :; do
408	    buc_log_args "Build URL with optional pageToken -> ${z_first}"
409	    local z_url="${z_list_url_base}"
410	    if test -n "${z_page_token}"; then
411	      buc_log_args 'pageToken must be URL-encoded'
412	      local z_tok_enc
413	      z_tok_enc=$(rbuh_urlencode_capture "${z_page_token}") || return 1
414	      z_url="${z_url}?pageToken=${z_tok_enc}"
415	    fi
416	
417	    buc_log_args 'Use a unique infix per page to avoid clobbering files'
418	    local z_infix="${ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_LIST}${z_first}"
419	    rbuh_json "GET" "${z_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}"
420	
421	    local z_code
422	    z_code=$(rbuh_code_capture "${z_infix}") || return 1
423	    test "${z_code}" = "200" || return 1
424	
425	    buc_log_args 'Print names from this page (if any)'
426	    buc_log_args 'Next page?'
427	    jq -r                '.items[]?.name // empty' "${ZRBUH_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBUH_POSTFIX_JSON}"  || return 1
428	    z_page_token=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" '.nextPageToken') || z_page_token=""
429	
430	    test -n "${z_page_token}" || break
431	    z_first=$((z_first + 1))
432	  done
433	}

451	zrbgg_empty_gcs_bucket() {
452	  zrbgg_sentinel
453	
454	  local z_token="${1}"
455	  local z_bucket_name="${2}"
456	
457	  buc_log_args 'Get list of objects to delete'
458	  local z_objects
459	  z_objects=$(zrbgg_list_bucket_objects_capture "${z_token}" "${z_bucket_name}") || {
460	    buc_log_args 'No objects found or bucket not accessible'
461	    return 0
462	  }
463	
464	  test -n "${z_objects}" || { buc_log_args 'Bucket is empty'; return 0; }
465	
466	  buc_log_args 'Delete each object'
467	  local z_object=""
468	  local z_delete_url=""
469	  local z_delete_code=""
470	  while IFS= read -r z_object; do
471	    test -n "${z_object}" || continue
472	    buc_log_args "Deleting object: ${z_object}"
473	
474	    local z_object_enc
475	    z_object_enc=$(rbuh_urlencode_capture "${z_object}") || z_object_enc=""
476	    test -n "${z_object_enc}" || { buc_warn "Failed to encode object name: ${z_object}"; continue; }
477	    z_delete_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE}${RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1}/b/${z_bucket_name}/o/${z_object_enc}"
478	
479	    rbuh_json "DELETE" "${z_delete_url}" \
480	                              "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_OBJECT_DELETE}"
481	    z_delete_code=$(rbuh_code_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_OBJECT_DELETE}") || z_delete_code=""
482	    case "${z_delete_code}" in
483	      204|404) buc_log_args "Object ${z_object}: deleted or not found"                     ;;
484	      *)       buc_warn     "Object ${z_object}: Failed to delete (HTTP ${z_delete_code})" ;;
485	    esac
486	  done <<< "${z_objects}"
487	}

489	zrbgg_delete_gcs_bucket_predicate() {
490	  zrbgg_sentinel
491	
492	  local z_token="${1}"
493	  local z_bucket_name="${2}"
494	
495	  buc_log_args 'Empty bucket before deletion: '"${z_bucket_name}"
496	  zrbgg_empty_gcs_bucket "${z_token}" "${z_bucket_name}"
497	
498	  buc_log_args 'Delete the bucket'
499	  local z_code
500	  local z_err
501	  local z_delete_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE}${RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1}/b/${z_bucket_name}"
502	  rbuh_json "DELETE" "${z_delete_url}" \
503	                      "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_DELETE}"
504	  z_code=$(rbuh_code_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_DELETE}") || z_code=""
505	  z_err=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_DELETE}" '.error.message') || z_err="HTTP ${z_code}"
506	  case "${z_code}" in
507	    204) buc_info "Bucket ${z_bucket_name} deleted";                           return 0 ;;
508	    404) buc_warn "Bucket ${z_bucket_name} not found (already deleted)";       return 0 ;;
509	    409) buc_warn "Bucket ${z_bucket_name} not empty or has retention policy"; return 1 ;;
510	    *)   buc_warn "Bucket ${z_bucket_name} failed delete";                     return 1 ;;
511	  esac
512	}

514	######################################################################
515	# External Functions (rbgg_*)
516	
517	# Roster a single role: paginate the SA list, filter by role-prefix,
518	# emit per-identity fact files (basename = identity, content = full email)
519	# and a human-readable line per match. Used by rbgg_roster_retrievers /
520	# rbgg_roster_directors via $1 = role tinder, $2 = fact-extension tinder.
521	zrbgg_roster_role() {
522	  zrbgg_sentinel
523	
524	  local -r z_role="$1"
525	  local -r z_fact_ext="$2"
526	
527	  buc_step "Rostering ${z_role} service accounts in project: ${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
528	
529	  buc_log_args 'Get OAuth token from admin'
530	  local z_token
531	  z_token=$(rba_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token (rc=$?)"
532	
533	  local z_url_base="${RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}"
534	  local z_page_token=""
535	  local z_page=1
536	  local z_count=0
537	
538	  while :; do
539	    local z_url="${z_url_base}"
540	    if test -n "${z_page_token}"; then
541	      local z_tok_enc
542	      z_tok_enc=$(rbuh_urlencode_capture "${z_page_token}") \
543	        || buc_die "Failed to URL-encode pageToken"
544	      z_url="${z_url}?pageToken=${z_tok_enc}"
545	    fi
546	
547	    local z_infix="${ZRBGG_INFIX_ROSTER}_${z_role}_${z_page}"
548	    rbuh_json "GET" "${z_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}"
549	    rbuh_require_ok "List service accounts (page ${z_page})" "${z_infix}"
550	
551	    local z_sa_count
552	    z_sa_count=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" '.accounts // [] | length') \
553	      || buc_die "Failed to parse service accounts page"
554	
555	    local z_index=0
556	    while test "${z_index}" -lt "${z_sa_count}"; do
557	      local z_sa_email
558	      z_sa_email=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" ".accounts[${z_index}].email") \
559	        || { z_index=$((z_index + 1)); continue; }
560	      if [[ "${z_sa_email}" =~ ^${z_role}-(.+)@${RBGD_SA_EMAIL_FULL}$ ]]; then
561	        local z_identity="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
562	        buf_write_fact_multi "${z_identity}" "${z_fact_ext}" "${z_sa_email}"
563	        buc_bare "  ${z_identity}  ${z_sa_email}"
564	        z_count=$((z_count + 1))
565	      fi
566	      z_index=$((z_index + 1))
567	    done
568	
569	    z_page_token=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" '.nextPageToken') || z_page_token=""
570	    test -n "${z_page_token}" || break
571	    z_page=$((z_page + 1))
572	  done
573	
574	  buc_info "Found ${z_count} ${z_role} service account(s)"
575	  buc_success "Roster operation completed"
576	}
